title: scopellaria
intro: Scopellaria is a genus of flowering plants in the family Scrophulariaceae, commonly known as broom-rape or dodder. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Scopellaria include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Scopellaria can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in some traditional remedies for its purported medicinal properties.
